name: Simulated Create – Seat Assignment Error
scenario_description: Mia Lopez was moved to an inferior seat on ZA303 without consent. Tests Seating / Low severity path.
complaint_description: I had selected seat 12A (window) for flight ZA303 at booking but was reassigned to 22C (middle seat) at check-in without any explanation or compensation. The gate agent told me my original seat was given to another passenger and refused to explain further.
